name: Keap

auth.notes: OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens for public apps; Personal Access Tokens and Service Account Keys can also be used as bearer tokens for a single Keap app.

rateLimits: OAuth client credentials: 1500 queries/minute and 150000 queries/day across Keap apps. Personal Access Tokens and Service Account Keys: 10 queries/second, 240 queries/minute, and 30000 queries/day. Responses expose quota and throttle headers.
pagination: REST v2 list endpoints use page_size and page_token. Legacy REST v1 endpoints use older endpoint-specific patterns.
notes: REST v2 is current; REST v1 is marked deprecated in Keap's developer guide.
Keap publishes generated SDKs and an OpenAPI-derived swagger.yml in the official infusionsoft/keap-sdk repository.
